# Version 3.119.5
> **Servicing fixes**

## Highlights

Servicing work on the 3.119 line, restoring WinUI Projection loading for .NET 9 consumers.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **WinUI Projection loads on .NET 9** — Fixes a DLL-not-found error that stopped .NET 9 consumers of the WinUI projection assembly from starting. ([#4086](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4086))

## Platform

- **Release-branch CI back to green** — Refreshes the 3.119.x pipeline for ANGLE, the WASM 2.0.6 workload, the current Tizen SDK and the newer Alpine base image so servicing builds keep flowing. ([#4045](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4045))
